text_jp:
この時代に出現した
闇の力により…我は目覚めた…{END}
…お前たち人類も…元は闇の子供…{END}
text_en:
...You humans too...
were originally children of darkness...{END}

text_jp:
だが、我が世界に
忌まわしき力を宿す人類は…必要ない…{END}

…忌まわしき…アギトの力のことか！？
お前は、時空を操り何を企んでいる！{END}
text_en:
...That accursed power...
do you mean Agito's power!?
What are you plotting
by controlling space-time!?{END}

The creation...
of a kaijin world...{END}

text_jp: 人類は…我の復活と共に滅ぶがいい…{END}
text_en:
Humanity... shall perish
with my revival...{END}

text_jp: そんな事はさせない…絶対に！{END}
text_en:
I will not let that happen...
Never!{END}
